items.name: Evil Camo V.S. Magma
items.description:
Magma: Why? Why are you just gonna betray us like this!?
Camo: I have seen it.. What I must do... It was ment to be this way!!!
Magma: To betray your friends? You're Joining forces with him!? Just walk away with Demon Camo!?!?
Camo: I AM A STREET RAT!!! I TURNED EVIL 9 YEARS OLD!!!! IT WAS MENT TO BE THIS WAY!!! MY DESTINY...
Magma: What about Blaze!? Naz? Zero!? Darkness!? ME!!!!
Camo: I DON't EVEN REMEMBER HER!!!! I COULD CARE LESS WHAT HAPPENS TO HER!!!!
Magma: I'LL BREAK YOUR ARMS AND LEGS IF THATS WHAT IT TAKES TO BRING YOU BACK!!!!
Camo: SHUT THAT RED FURED MOUTH!!!! I'M GONNA  SHUT YOU UP!!!!!!
*WAP*
Magma: ...Hufff.... Huh....
Camo: *Gets away with Demon camo and Blistering Blaze*

Rainbow RGB Tie Dye Summer Gamer T-Shirt

This epic and mega cool rainbow lasers powers t-shirt features a magic set of rainbow stripes aesthetic with red / orange / yellow / green / blue / indigo / violet / pink super colors on a dark black background. Take this ultra colourful and awsome ultimate classic elemental rainbow wherever you go with this colorful RGB tye dye gaming aesthetic shirt ! Be the coolest and best gamer !!!

items.name: Vibing Idle
items.description:
Love this item? 🌟 Check out my other creations here:
👀 Profile: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Christocream&salesTypeFilter=1
🤝 Group: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Christocreams+Paradise&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

🎉 Don't forget to favorite for a lower price!

Bring smooth energy to your avatar with the Vibing Idol Emote. This vibing idol emote blends cute emote charm with cool emote style, giving you an idol dance packed with expressive personality. Perfect for anime idol fans, kawaii emote lovers, and anyone who wants an aesthetic dance that stands out. Works as a roblox emote, ugc emote, catalog emote, and fits any avatar animation or character animation setup. A trendy emote that’s great for movement emotes, idle moments, performance emotes, and stylish showcases—your avatar’s new favorite vibe.
